title: athyrium gymnogrammoides
intro: Athyrium gymnogrammoides, also known as the variegated lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Athyrium gymnogrammoides is often made into tea or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
